questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶進行儲存空間來實作文件審閱應用程式。解決方案必須防止文件被意外刪除，並確保文件的所有版本都可用。使用者必須能夠下載、修改和上傳文件。應採取哪些行動組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A solutions architect is implementing a document review application using an Amazon S3 bucket for storage. The solution must prevent accidental deletion of the documents and ensure that all versions of the documents are available. Users must be able to download, modify, and upload documents. Which combination of actions should be taken to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 啟用唯讀儲存桶 ACL。
A.en: Enable a read-only bucket ACL.

B.zh: 在儲存桶上啟用版本控制。
B.en: Enable versioning on the bucket.

C.zh: 將 IAM 政策附加到儲存桶。
C.en: Attach an IAM policy to the bucket.

D.zh: 在儲存桶上啟用 MFA 刪除。
D.en: Enable MFA Delete on the bucket.

E.zh: 使用 AWS KMS 加密儲存桶。
E.en: Encrypt the bucket using AWS KMS.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項啟用只讀ACL會限制使用者對儲存桶的寫入權限，而問題要求使用者能夠下載、修改和上傳文件。
A.en: Incorrect. Enable read-only bucket ACLs. Enabling a read-only ACL restricts the user's write access to the bucket, while the question requires the user to be able to download, modify, and upload documents.

B.zh: 正確。啟用版本控制可確保儲存所有文件的版本，防止意外刪除或覆寫。
B.en: Correct. Enabling version control ensures that versions of all documents are saved, preventing accidental deletion or overwriting.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項儘管 IAM 策略可以控制訪問，但它無法防止意外刪除或確保文件的版本可用性。
C.en: Incorrect. Attach the IAM policy to the bucket. Although an IAM policy can control access, it cannot prevent accidental deletion or ensure version availability of a document.

D.zh: 正確。啟用 MFA 刪除可提高刪除操作的安全性並防止意外刪除。
D.en: Correct. Enabling MFA Delete increases the security of delete operations and prevents accidental deletions.

E.zh: 錯誤。加密可以保護資料的安全，但與防止意外刪除和版本控制無關。
E.en: Incorrect. Encryption protects the security of data but has nothing to do with protection against accidental deletion and versioning.

answer_text.zh: B. 在儲存桶上啟用版本控制。；D. 在儲存桶上啟用 MFA 刪除。
answer_text.en: B. Enable versioning on the bucket.; D. Enable MFA Delete on the bucket.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：啟用版本控制可確保儲存所有文件的版本，防止意外刪除或覆寫。；啟用 MFA 刪除可提高刪除操作的安全性並防止意外刪除。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Enabling version control ensures that versions of all documents are saved, preventing accidental deletion or overwriting.; Enabling MFA Delete increases the security of delete operations and prevents accidental deletions.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在建立一個解決方案，該解決方案將報告 AWS 帳戶中所有應用程式的 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 事件。該公司需要使用無伺服器解決方案將 EC2 Auto Scaling 狀態資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。然後，該公司將使用 Amazon S3 中的資料在儀錶板中提供近乎即時的更新。此解決方案不得影響 EC2 執行個體啟動的速度。公司應該如何將資料遷移到 Amazon S3 來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a solution that will report Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling events across all the applications in an AWS account. The company needs to use a serverless solution to store the EC2 Auto Scaling status data in Amazon S3. The company then will use the data in Amazon S3 to provide near-real-time updates in a dashboard. The solution must not affect the speed of EC2 instance launches. How should the company move the data to Amazon S3 to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 指標流將 EC2 Auto Scaling 狀態資料傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。
A.en: Use an Amazon CloudWatch metric stream to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.

B.zh: 啟動 Amazon EMR 叢集以收集 EC2 Auto Scaling 狀態資料並將資料傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。
B.en: Launch an Amazon EMR cluster to collect the EC2 Auto Scaling status data and send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon EventBridge 規則以按計畫呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數。配置 Lambda 函數以將 EC2 Auto Scaling 狀態資料直接傳送到 Amazon S3。
C.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge rule to invoke an AWS Lambda function on a schedule. Configure the Lambda function to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data directly to Amazon S3.

D.zh: 在啟動 EC2 執行個體期間使用引導腳本來安裝 Amazon Kinesis Agent。配置 Kinesis Agent 以收集 EC2 Auto Scaling 狀態資料並將資料傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。
D.en: Use a bootstrap script during the launch of an EC2 instance to install Amazon Kinesis Agent. Configure Kinesis Agent to collect the EC2 Auto Scaling status data and send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon CloudWatch 指標流可以即時擷取 EC2 Auto Scaling 事件資料並將其傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接儲存到 Amazon S3，以滿足無伺服器架構的要求。此場景不會影響 EC2 執行個體啟動速度，因為資料流是非同步的。
A.en: Correct. The Amazon CloudWatch metric stream can capture EC2 Auto Scaling event data in real time and send it to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose can store data directly to Amazon S3 to meet the requirements of serverless architecture. This scenario does not affect EC2 instance startup speed because the data stream is asynchronous.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EMR 是一項大數據處理服務，通常用於複雜的批次任務，而不是即時資料流處理。使用 EMR 會增加複雜性和成本，且不符合無伺服器架構的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon EMR is a big data processing service that is typically used for complex batch processing tasks rather than real-time data stream processing. Using EMR adds complexity and cost and is not consistent with the requirements of a serverless architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然EventBridge可以捕捉事件並觸發Lambda函數，但這種方法需要定期輪詢，可能會導致延遲，並且無法實現近乎即時的更新。直接向 S3 發送資料可能缺乏資料流的靈活性和可擴展性。
C.en: Incorrect. Although EventBridge can capture events and trigger Lambda functions, this method requires regular polling, may cause delays, and cannot achieve near real-time updates. Sending data directly to S3 may lack the flexibility and scalability of data streaming.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用開機腳本會增加EC2實例啟動時間，直接影響執行個體啟動速度。 Kinesis Agent 通常用於日誌資料收集，而不是處理 EC2 Auto Scaling 事件資料。 [[T0195]]] 效能分析：雖然Lambda可以處理S3 PUT事件並執行轉換，但由於檔案大小為1GB，Lambda的記憶體和執行時間限制可能會導致故障或效能問題。結論：這個選項是錯誤的，因為它不能可靠地處理大檔案並且操作成本昂貴。
D.en: Incorrect. Using the bootstrap script will increase the EC2 instance startup time, which directly affects the instance startup speed. Kinesis Agent is typically used for log data collection rather than processing EC2 Auto Scaling event data.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 指標流將 EC2 Auto Scaling 狀態資料傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。
answer_text.en: A. Use an Amazon CloudWatch metric stream to send the EC2 Auto Scaling status data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Store the data in Amazon S3.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (88%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon CloudWatch 指標流可以即時擷取 EC2 Auto Scaling 事件資料並將其傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接儲存到 Amazon S3，以滿足無伺服器架構的要求。此場景不會影響 EC2 執行個體啟動速度，因為資料流是非同步的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (88%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Amazon CloudWatch metric stream can capture EC2 Auto Scaling event data in real time and send it to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose can store data directly to Amazon S3 to meet the requirements of serverless architecture. This scenario does not affect EC2 instance startup speed because the data stream is asynchronous.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司的應用程式每小時將數百個 .csv 檔案放入 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。檔案大小為 1 GB。每次上傳檔案時，該公司都需要將檔案轉換為 Apache Parquet 格式並將輸出檔案放入 S3 儲存桶中。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that places hundreds of .csv files into an Amazon S3 bucket every hour. The files are 1 GB in size. Each time a file is uploaded, the company needs to convert the file to Apache Parquet format and place the output file into an S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數來下載 .csv 檔案、將檔案轉換為 Parquet 格式，並將輸出檔案放入 S3 儲存桶中。為每個 S3 PUT 事件呼叫 Lambda 函數。
A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to download the .csv files, convert the files to Parquet format, and place the output files in an S3 bucket. Invoke the Lambda function for each S3 PUT event.

B.zh: 建立一個 Apache Spark 作業來讀取 .csv 文件，將文件轉換為 Parquet 格式，並將輸出文件放入 S3 儲存桶中。為每個 S3 PUT 事件建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數以呼叫 Spark 作業。
B.en: Create an Apache Spark job to read the .csv files, convert the files to Parquet format, and place the output files in an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the Spark job.

C.zh: 為應用程式放置 .csv 檔案的 S3 儲存桶建立一個 AWS Glue 表和一個 AWS Glue 爬網程式。安排 AWS Lambda 函數定期使用 Amazon Athena 查詢 AWS Glue 表，將查詢結果轉換為 Parquet 格式，並將輸出檔案放入 S3 儲存桶中。
C.en: Create an AWS Glue table and an AWS Glue crawler for the S3 bucket where the application places the .csv files. Schedule an AWS Lambda function to periodically use Amazon Athena to query the AWS Glue table, convert the query results into Parquet format, and place the output files into an S3 bucket.

D.zh: 建立 AWS Glue 提取、轉換和載入 (ETL) 作業以將 .csv 檔案轉換為 Parquet 格式並將輸出檔案放入 S3 儲存桶中。為每個 S3 PUT 事件建立 AWS Lambda 函數以呼叫 ETL 作業。
D.en: Create an AWS Glue extract, transform, and load (ETL) job to convert the .csv files to Parquet format and place the output files into an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the ETL job.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然 Lambda 可以處理 S3 PUT 事件並執行轉換，但由於檔案大小為 1GB，Lambda 的記憶體和執行時間限制可能會導致故障或效能問題。這個選項是錯誤的，因為它不能可靠地處理大文件並且操作成本昂貴。
A.en: Incorrect. Although Lambda can handle S3 PUT events and perform transformations, since the file size is 1GB, Lambda's memory and execution time limitations may cause failures or performance issues. This option is wrong because it does not reliably handle large files and is expensive to operate.

B.zh: 錯誤。Apache Spark適合處理大規模數據，但需要額外的基礎設施（例如Amazon EMR），這增加了管理複雜性。這個選項是錯誤的，因為它增加了營運開銷並且不滿足「最小營運開銷」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Apache Spark is suitable for processing large-scale data, but requires additional infrastructure (such as Amazon EMR), which increases management complexity. This option is wrong because it adds operational overhead and does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項涉及多個服務（Glue、Athena、Lambda），流程複雜，需要定期調度，增加了營運開銷。這個選項是錯誤的，因為它不滿足「最小營運開銷」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. This option involves multiple services (Glue, Athena, Lambda), the process is complex and requires regular scheduling, which increases operational overhead. This option is wrong because it does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Glue ETL 作業專為資料轉換而設計，支援大檔案處理，並且可以很好地與 S3 輸出配合使用。 Lambda 觸發 Glue 作業，自動化程度高，營運開銷低。這個選項是正確的，因為它滿足「最小營運開銷」的要求。
D.en: Correct. AWS Glue ETL jobs are specially designed for data conversion, support large file processing, and work well with S3 output. Lambda triggers Glue jobs with a high degree of automation and low operating overhead. This option is correct because it meets the requirement of "minimum operational overhead".

answer_text.zh: D. 建立 AWS Glue 提取、轉換和載入 (ETL) 作業以將 .csv 檔案轉換為 Parquet 格式並將輸出檔案放入 S3 儲存桶中。為每個 S3 PUT 事件建立 AWS Lambda 函數以呼叫 ETL 作業。
answer_text.en: D. Create an AWS Glue extract, transform, and load (ETL) job to convert the .csv files to Parquet format and place the output files into an S3 bucket. Create an AWS Lambda function for each S3 PUT event to invoke the ETL job.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (91%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Glue ETL 作業專為資料轉換而設計，支援大檔案處理，並且可以很好地與 S3 輸出配合使用。 Lambda 觸發 Glue 作業，自動化程度高，營運開銷低。這個選項是正確的，因為它滿足「最小營運開銷」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (91%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Glue ETL jobs are specially designed for data conversion, support large file processing, and work well with S3 output. Lambda triggers Glue jobs with a high degree of automation and low operating overhead. This option is correct because it meets the requirement of "minimum operational overhead".

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在為 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體上執行的所有資料庫實施新的資料保留策略。公司必須將每日備份保留至少 2 年。備份必須一致且可恢復。解決方案架構師應該推薦哪一種解決方案來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is implementing new data retention policies for all databases that run on Amazon RDS DB instances. The company must retain daily backups for a minimum period of 2 years. The backups must be consistent and restorable. Which solution should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS Backup 中建立備份檔案庫以保留 RDS 備份。建立一個新的備份計劃，其中包含每日計劃和創建後 2 年的有效期。將 RDS 資料庫執行個體指派給備份計畫。
A.en: Create a backup vault in AWS Backup to retain RDS backups. Create a new backup plan with a daily schedule and an expiration period of 2 years after creation. Assign the RDS DB instances to the backup plan.

B.zh: 為 RDS 資料庫執行個體配置每日快照的備份視窗。為每個 RDS 資料庫執行個體指派 2 年的快照保留策略。使用 Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager (Amazon DLM) 安排快照刪除。
B.en: Configure a backup window for the RDS DB instances for daily snapshots. Assign a snapshot retention policy of 2 years to each RDS DB instance. Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager (Amazon DLM) to schedule snapshot deletions.

C.zh: 將資料庫交易日誌配置為自動備份到 Amazon CloudWatch Logs，有效期限為 2 年。
C.en: Configure database transaction logs to be automatically backed up to Amazon CloudWatch Logs with an expiration period of 2 years.

D.zh: 設定 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 複製任務。部署複製實例，並配置變更資料擷取 (CDC) 任務以將資料庫變更串流傳輸到作為目標的 Amazon S3。配置 S3 生命週期策略以在 2 年後刪除快照。
D.en: Configure an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) replication task. Deploy a replication instance, and configure a change data capture (CDC) task to stream database changes to Amazon S3 as the target. Configure S3 Lifecycle policies to delete the snapshots after 2 years.

A.zh: 正確。AWS Backup 是一項專為資料管理和自動備份而設計的服務。它支援RDS備份並允許設定備份計劃和保留策略。您可以建立備份資料庫並定義備份計劃，包括每日備份和2年保留期，完全滿足題目要求。
A.en: Correct. AWS Backup is a service specifically designed for data management and automated backup. It supports RDS backup and allows setting backup plans and retention strategies. You can create a backup database and define a backup plan, including daily backup and a 2-year retention period, which fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DLM 主要用於管理 EBS 快照生命週期，而非 RDS 快照。 DLM 管理無法存取 RDS 快照的保留策略。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon DLM is mainly used to manage the EBS snapshot life cycle, not RDS snapshots. The retention policy for RDS snapshots cannot be accessed by DLM Management.

C.zh: 錯誤。CloudWatch Logs 主要用於日誌控制和分析，不用於備份資料庫快照。交易日誌備份無法滿足問題中「備份必須一致且可還原」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. CloudWatch Logs is mainly used for log control and analysis, and is not used for backing up database snapshots. The transaction log backup cannot meet the requirement of "the backup must be consistent and recoverable" in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 主要用於資料庫遷移，而非備份管理。 CDC任務擷取的是資料變化，而不是完整的資料庫快照，無法滿足問題的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS DMS is mainly used for database migration, not backup management. The CDC task captures data changes, not a complete database snapshot, which cannot meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 AWS Backup 中建立備份檔案庫以保留 RDS 備份。建立一個新的備份計劃，其中包含每日計劃和創建後 2 年的有效期。將 RDS 資料庫執行個體指派給備份計畫。
answer_text.en: A. Create a backup vault in AWS Backup to retain RDS backups. Create a new backup plan with a daily schedule and an expiration period of 2 years after creation. Assign the RDS DB instances to the backup plan.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (95%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Backup 是一項專為資料管理和自動備份而設計的服務。它支援RDS備份並允許設定備份計劃和保留策略。您可以建立備份資料庫並定義備份計劃，包括每日備份和2年保留期，完全滿足題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Backup is a service specifically designed for data management and automated backup. It supports RDS backup and allows setting backup plans and retention strategies. You can create a backup database and define a backup plan, including daily backup and a 2-year retention period, which fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的合規團隊需要將其檔案共用移至 AWS。這些共享在 Windows Server SMB 檔案共用上運行。自我管理的本機 Active Directory 控制對檔案和資料夾的存取。該公司希望使用 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 作為解決方案的一部分。公司必須確保在移轉到 AWS 後，本機 Active Directory 群組限制對 FSx for Windows File Server SMB 合規性共用、資料夾和檔案的存取。該公司創建了 FSx for Windows File Server 檔案系統。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company’s compliance team needs to move its file shares to AWS. The shares run on a Windows Server SMB file share. A self- managed on-premises Active Directory controls access to the files and folders. The company wants to use Amazon FSx for Windows File Server as part of the solution. The company must ensure that the on- premises Active Directory groups restrict access to the FSx for Windows File Server SMB compliance shares, folders, and files after the move to AWS. The company has created an FSx for Windows File Server file system. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 Active Directory 連接器以連接到 Active Directory。將 Active Directory 群組對應到 IAM 群組以限制存取。
A.en: Create an Active Directory Connector to connect to the Active Directory. Map the Active Directory groups to IAM groups to restrict access.

B.zh: 為標籤指派「限制」標籤鍵和「合規性」標籤值。將 Active Directory 群組對應到 IAM 群組以限制存取。
B.en: Assign a tag with a Restrict tag key and a Compliance tag value. Map the Active Directory groups to IAM groups to restrict access.

C.zh: 建立直接連結到 FSx for Windows File Server 的 IAM 服務相關角色以限制存取。
C.en: Create an IAM service-linked role that is linked directly to FSx for Windows File Server to restrict access.

D.zh: 將檔案系統加入 Active Directory 以限制存取。
D.en: Join the file system to the Active Directory to restrict access.

A.zh: 錯誤。Active Directory Connector 用於將 AWS Managed Microsoft AD 與本機 Active Directory 集成，但它不適用於 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 的直接存取控制。 IAM 群組無法直接對應到 Active Directory 群組來控製檔案系統存取。
A.en: Incorrect. Active Directory Connector is used to integrate AWS Managed Microsoft AD with on-premises Active Directory, but it does not work with direct access control for Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. IAM groups cannot be mapped directly to Active Directory groups to control file system access.

B.zh: 錯誤。標籤用於資源識別和管理，而不是存取控制。同樣，IAM 群組無法直接對應到 Active Directory 群組來控製檔案系統存取。
B.en: Incorrect. Tags are used for resource identification and management, not for access control. Likewise, IAM groups cannot be mapped directly to Active Directory groups to control file system access.

C.zh: 錯誤。IAM 服務關聯角色用於 AWS 服務之間的權限管理，但不能直接用於控制 FSx 檔案系統的存取權限。檔案系統存取需要透過 Active Directory 群組而不是 IAM 角色進行管理。
C.en: Incorrect. IAM service-associated roles are used for permission management between AWS services, but cannot be used directly to control access permissions of the FSx file system. File system access needs to be managed through Active Directory groups, not IAM roles.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 支援與自架 Active Directory 整合。透過將檔案系統加入 Active Directory，您可以使用現有的 Active Directory 群組和使用者來控制對檔案和資料夾的存取。這是實施基於 Active Directory 的存取控制的建議方法。
D.en: Correct. Amazon FSx for Windows File Server supports integration with self-hosted Active Directory. By joining a file system to Active Directory, you can use existing Active Directory groups and users to control access to files and folders. This is the recommended way to implement Active Directory-based access control.

answer_text.zh: D. 將檔案系統加入 Active Directory 以限制存取。
answer_text.en: D. Join the file system to the Active Directory to restrict access.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (90%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 支援與自架 Active Directory 整合。透過將檔案系統加入 Active Directory，您可以使用現有的 Active Directory 群組和使用者來控制對檔案和資料夾的存取。這是實施基於 Active Directory 的存取控制的建議方法。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (90%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server supports integration with self-hosted Active Directory. By joining a file system to Active Directory, you can use existing Active Directory groups and users to control access to files and folders. This is the recommended way to implement Active Directory-based access control.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近宣布向全球受眾部署其零售網站。網站在彈性負載平衡器後面的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。執行個體在跨多個可用區的 Auto Scaling 群組中執行。該公司希望根據客戶造訪網站所使用的設備為其客戶提供不同版本的內容。解決方案架構師應該採取哪些操作組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company recently announced the deployment of its retail website to a global audience. The website runs on multiple Amazon EC2 instances behind an Elastic Load Balancer. The instances run in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The company wants to provide its customers with different versions of content based on the devices that the customers use to access the website. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 設定 Amazon CloudFront 以快取內容的多個版本。
A.en: Configure Amazon CloudFront to cache multiple versions of the content.

B.zh: 在網路負載平衡器中設定主機頭以將流量轉送到不同的執行個體。
B.en: Configure a host header in a Network Load Balancer to forward traffic to different instances.

C.zh: 設定 Lambda@Edge 函數以根據 User-Agent 標頭向使用者傳送特定物件。
C.en: Configure a Lambda@Edge function to send specific objects to users based on the User-Agent header.

D.zh: 配置 AWS Global Accelerator。將請求轉送至網路負載平衡器 (NLB)。配置 NLB 以設定到不同 EC2 執行個體的基於主機的路由。
D.en: Configure AWS Global Accelerator. Forward requests to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to set up host- based routing to different EC2 instances.

E.zh: 配置 AWS Global Accelerator。將請求轉發到網絡負載均衡器 (NLB)。配置 NLB 以設定到不同 EC2 執行個體的基於路徑的路由。
E.en: Configure AWS Global Accelerator. Forward requests to a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to set up path- based routing to different EC2 instances.

A.zh: 正確。CloudFront 可以透過在快取鍵中包含 User-Agent 標頭來快取單獨的內容變體，從而允許高效地提供特定於裝置的版本。
A.en: Correct. CloudFront can cache separate content variants by including the User-Agent header in the cache key, allowing device-specific versions to be served efficiently.

B.zh: 錯誤。網路負載平衡器主要用於基於IP位址和連接埠的流量轉發，不支援基於User-Agent或其他複雜HTTP頭的路由。
B.en: Incorrect. Network Load Balancer is mainly used for traffic forwarding based on IP address and port, and does not support routing based on User-Agent or other complex HTTP headers.

C.zh: 正確。Lambda@Edge 可以根據 User-Agent header 動態處理請求並傳回特定內容，非常適合使用者場景。
C.en: Correct. Lambda@Edge can dynamically process requests and return specific content based on the User-Agent header, which is very suitable for user scenarios.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Global Accelerator 與 NLB 的結合主要用於加速和分發流量，但不支援基於 User-Agent header 的動態內容分發。
D.en: Incorrect. The combination of AWS Global Accelerator and NLB is mainly used to accelerate and distribute traffic, but does not support dynamic content distribution based on the User-Agent header.

E.zh: 錯誤。與選項D類似，NLB不支援基於User-Agent標頭的動態內容分發，且路徑路由與問題要求無關。
E.en: Incorrect. Similar to option D, NLB does not support dynamic content distribution based on the User-Agent header, and path routing has nothing to do with the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 設定 Amazon CloudFront 以快取內容的多個版本。；C. 設定 Lambda@Edge 函數以根據 User-Agent 標頭向使用者傳送特定物件。
answer_text.en: A. Configure Amazon CloudFront to cache multiple versions of the content.; C. Configure a Lambda@Edge function to send specific objects to users based on the User-Agent header.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AC (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：CloudFront 可以透過在快取鍵中包含 User-Agent 標頭來快取單獨的內容變體，從而允許高效地提供特定於裝置的版本。；Lambda@Edge 可以根據 User-Agent header 動態處理請求並傳回特定內容，非常適合使用者場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: CloudFront can cache separate content variants by including the User-Agent header in the cache key, allowing device-specific versions to be served efficiently.; Lambda@Edge can dynamically process requests and return specific content based on the User-Agent header, which is very suitable for user scenarios.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃將 Amazon ElastiCache 用於其多層 Web 應用程式。解決方案架構師為 ElastiCache 叢集建立一個快取 VPC，並為應用程式的 Amazon EC2 執行個體建立一個應用程式 VPC。兩個 VPC 均位於 us-east-1 區域。解決方案架構師必須實作一個解決方案，為應用程式的 EC2 執行個體提供對 ElastiCache 叢集的存取權限。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to use Amazon ElastiCache for its multi-tier web application. A solutions architect creates a Cache VPC for the ElastiCache cluster and an App VPC for the application’s Amazon EC2 instances. Both VPCs are in the us-east-1 Region. The solutions architect must implement a solution to provide the application’s EC2 instances with access to the ElastiCache cluster. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 在 VPC 之間創建對等連接。為兩個 VPC 中的對等連接新增路由表條目。為 ElastiCache 叢集的安全群組配置入站規則，以允許來自應用程式安全群組的入站連線。
A.en: Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.

B.zh: 創建中轉 VPC。更新快取 VPC 和應用程式 VPC 中的 VPC 路由表，以透過傳輸 VPC 路由流量。為 ElastiCache 叢集的安全群組配置入站規則，以允許來自應用程式安全群組的入站連線。
B.en: Create a Transit VPC. Update the VPC route tables in the Cache VPC and the App VPC to route traffic through the Transit VPC. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster's security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.

C.zh: 在 VPC 之間創建對等連接。為兩個 VPC 中的對等連接新增路由表條目。為對等連線的安全群組配置入站規則，以允許來自應用程式安全群組的入站連線。
C.en: Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the peering connection’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.

D.zh: 創建中轉 VPC。更新快取 VPC 和應用程式 VPC 中的 VPC 路由表，以透過傳輸 VPC 路由流量。為 Transit VPC 的安全群組設定入站規則，以允許來自應用程式安全群組的入站連線。
D.en: Create a Transit VPC. Update the VPC route tables in the Cache VPC and the App VPC to route traffic through the Transit VPC. Configure an inbound rule for the Transit VPC’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.

A.zh: 正確。VPC 對等互連是一種簡單且成本最低的解決方案，可實現兩個 VPC 之間的直接通訊。透過設定路由表和安全性群組規則，EC2實例可以存取ElastiCache叢集。成本分析：VPC對等連線沒有額外的中間資源（如Transit Gateway），因此成本最低。
A.en: Correct. VPC peering is a simple and lowest-cost solution that enables direct communication between two VPCs. By configuring routing tables and security group rules, EC2 instances can access the ElastiCache cluster. Cost analysis: VPC peering connection has no additional intermediate resources (such as Transit Gateway), so the cost is the lowest.

B.zh: 錯誤。中轉VPC是一種複雜的網路架構，通常用於跨多個VPC或跨區域的通訊。這種方法對於兩個 VPC 之間的通訊來說過於複雜。成本分析：中轉VPC需要額外的資源（如VPN閘道或第三方設備），成本較高。
B.en: Incorrect. Transit VPC is a complex network architecture that is usually used for communication across multiple VPCs or across regions. This approach is overly complex for communication between just two VPCs. Cost analysis: Transit VPC requires additional resources (such as VPN gateway or third-party equipment), and the cost is higher.

C.zh: 錯誤。VPC 對等連線本身沒有安全群組。安全性群組是針對資源（例如 EC2 執行個體或 ElastiCache 叢集）配置的。因此該選項的描述為：成本分析：雖然使用了VPC對等，但安全群組配置錯誤，無法通訊。
C.en: Incorrect. The VPC peering connection itself does not have a security group. Security groups are configured for resources (such as EC2 instances or ElastiCache clusters). Therefore the description of this option is Cost Analysis: Although VPC peering was used, the security group was configured incorrectly and communication was not possible.

D.zh: 錯誤。Transit VPC 的安全群組規則配置方法不適用於 ElastiCache 集群，因為 ElastiCache 的安全群組規則是直接針對叢集資源配置的。成本分析：中轉VPC昂貴且不必要。
D.en: Incorrect. The security group rule configuration method of Transit VPC is not applicable to the ElastiCache cluster, because the security group rules of ElastiCache are configured directly for cluster resources. Cost analysis: Transit VPC is expensive and unnecessary.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 VPC 之間創建對等連接。為兩個 VPC 中的對等連接新增路由表條目。為 ElastiCache 叢集的安全群組配置入站規則，以允許來自應用程式安全群組的入站連線。
answer_text.en: A. Create a peering connection between the VPCs. Add a route table entry for the peering connection in both VPCs. Configure an inbound rule for the ElastiCache cluster’s security group to allow inbound connection from the application’s security group.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：VPC 對等互連是一種簡單且成本最低的解決方案，可實現兩個 VPC 之間的直接通訊。透過設定路由表和安全性群組規則，EC2實例可以存取ElastiCache叢集。成本分析：VPC對等連線沒有額外的中間資源（如Transit Gateway），因此成本最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: VPC peering is a simple and lowest-cost solution that enables direct communication between two VPCs. By configuring routing tables and security group rules, EC2 instances can access the ElastiCache cluster. Cost analysis: VPC peering connection has no additional intermediate resources (such as Transit Gateway), so the cost is the lowest.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在建立一個由多個微服務組成的應用程式。該公司已決定使用容器技術在 AWS 上部署其軟體。該公司需要一種解決方案，最大限度地減少維護和擴展的持續工作量。該公司無法管理額外的基礎設施。解決方案架構師應該採取哪些操作組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company is building an application that consists of several microservices. The company has decided to use container technologies to deploy its software on AWS. The company needs a solution that minimizes the amount of ongoing effort for maintenance and scaling. The company cannot manage additional infrastructure. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 部署 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 叢集。
A.en: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster.

B.zh: 在跨多個可用區的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Kubernetes 控制平面。
B.en: Deploy the Kubernetes control plane on Amazon EC2 instances that span multiple Availability Zones.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 啟動類型部署 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服務。指定所需的任務編號等級大於或等於 2。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with an Amazon EC2 launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2.

D.zh: 使用 Fargate 啟動類型部署 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服務。指定所需的任務編號等級大於或等於 2。
D.en: Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with a Fargate launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2.

E.zh: 在跨多個可用區的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署 Kubernetes 工作執行緒節點。建立為每個微服務指定兩個或多個副本的部署。
E.en: Deploy Kubernetes worker nodes on Amazon EC2 instances that span multiple Availability Zones. Create a deployment that specifies two or more replicas for each microservice.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon ECS 是 AWS 的託管容器服務，支援自動化管理和擴充。部署ECS叢集是實現容器化應用的基礎步驟。
A.en: Correct. Amazon ECS is AWS's managed container service that supports automated management and scaling. Deploying an ECS cluster is the basic step to implement containerized applications.

B.zh: 錯誤。部署Kubernetes控制平面需要額外的管理基礎架構（EC2實例），這與「無法管理額外的基礎架構」的問題要求相反。
B.en: Incorrect. Deploying the Kubernetes control plane requires additional management infrastructure (EC2 instances), which is contrary to the question requirement of "not being able to manage additional infrastructure".

C.zh: 錯誤。使用EC2啟動類型需要管理底層EC2實例，增加了操作工作量，與問題所要求的「減少維護工作量」不符。
C.en: Incorrect. Using the EC2 startup type requires managing the underlying EC2 instances, which increases the operational workload and is inconsistent with the "reduce maintenance workload" required by the question.

D.zh: 正確。Fargate 是一個無伺服器容器運作時，底層基礎架構完全由 AWS 管理。它滿足了「減少維護工作量」和「無法管理額外基礎設施」的問題的要求。
D.en: Correct. Fargate is a serverless container runtime, and the underlying infrastructure is completely managed by AWS. It meets the requirements of the question of "reduce maintenance workload" and "cannot manage additional infrastructure.".

E.zh: 錯誤。部署Kubernetes工作節點需要管理EC2實例，這與「無法管理額外基礎架構」的問題要求相反。
E.en: Incorrect. Deploying Kubernetes worker nodes requires managing EC2 instances, which is contrary to the question requirement of "not being able to manage additional infrastructure.".

answer_text.zh: A. 部署 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 叢集。；D. 使用 Fargate 啟動類型部署 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 服務。指定所需的任務編號等級大於或等於 2。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) cluster.; D. Deploy an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service with a Fargate launch type. Specify a desired task number level of greater than or equal to 2.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ECS 是 AWS 的託管容器服務，支援自動化管理和擴充。部署ECS叢集是實現容器化應用的基礎步驟。；Fargate 是一個無伺服器容器運作時，底層基礎架構完全由 AWS 管理。它滿足了「減少維護工作量」和「無法管理額外基礎設施」的問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ECS is AWS's managed container service that supports automated management and scaling. Deploying an ECS cluster is the basic step to implement containerized applications.; Fargate is a serverless container runtime, and the underlying infrastructure is completely managed by AWS. It meets the requirements of the question of "reduce maintenance workload" and "cannot manage additional infrastructure.".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司的 Web 應用程式託管了 10 多個 Amazon EC2 實例，其流量由 Amazon Route 53 引導。該公司在嘗試瀏覽該應用程式時偶爾會遇到超時錯誤。網路團隊發現某些 DNS 查詢傳回不健康執行個體的 IP 位址，導致逾時錯誤。解決方案架構師應該採取什麼措施來克服這些逾時錯誤？
question_text.en: A company has a web application hosted over 10 Amazon EC2 instances with traffic directed by Amazon Route 53. The company occasionally experiences a timeout error when attempting to browse the application. The networking team finds that some DNS queries return IP addresses of unhealthy instances, resulting in the timeout error. What should a solutions architect implement to overcome these timeout errors?

A.zh: 為每個 EC2 執行個體建立 Route 53 簡單路由策略記錄。將健康檢查與每筆記錄相關聯。
A.en: Create a Route 53 simple routing policy record for each EC2 instance. Associate a health check with each record.

B.zh: 為每個 EC2 執行個體建立 Route 53 故障轉移路由策略記錄。將健康檢查與每筆記錄相關聯。
B.en: Create a Route 53 failover routing policy record for each EC2 instance. Associate a health check with each record.

C.zh: 建立以 EC2 執行個體作為來源的 Amazon CloudFront 分配。將運作狀況檢查與 EC2 執行個體關聯。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution with EC2 instances as its origin. Associate a health check with the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 建立一個應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)，並在 EC2 執行個體之前進行執行狀況檢查。從 53 號公路到 ALB 的路線。
D.en: Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) with a health check in front of the EC2 instances. Route to the ALB from Route 53.

A.zh: 錯誤。Route 53的簡單路由策略無法動態偵測實例的健康狀況並自動刪除不健康的實例。儘管可以手動關聯運行狀況檢查，但這不是最佳實踐。
A.en: Incorrect. Route 53’s simple routing policy cannot dynamically detect the health status of instances and automatically remove unhealthy instances. Although it is possible to associate health checks manually, this is not a best practice.

B.zh: 錯誤。故障轉移路由策略主要用於主備架構，而不是用於將流量指派到多個執行個體。該選項不適合當前場景。
B.en: Incorrect. The failover routing strategy is mainly used for active and standby architectures, rather than for distributing traffic to multiple instances. This option is not suitable for the current scenario.

C.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront主要用於內容傳遞網路（CDN），而不是直接解決實例健康檢查和流量分配問題。此選項與題目要求不符。
C.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is mainly used for content delivery networks (CDN), rather than directly solving instance health checking and traffic distribution issues. This option does not match the question requirements.

D.zh: 正確。ALB可以動態偵測實例的健康狀況，並自動將流量分配給健康的實例。與Route 53結合，可以實現高可用性和容錯架構。
D.en: Correct. ALB can dynamically detect the health status of instances and automatically distribute traffic to healthy instances. Combined with Route 53, high availability and fault-tolerant architecture can be achieved.

answer_text.zh: D. 建立一個應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)，並在 EC2 執行個體之前進行執行狀況檢查。從 53 號公路到 ALB 的路線。
answer_text.en: D. Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) with a health check in front of the EC2 instances. Route to the ALB from Route 53.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (72%)； B (20%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：ALB可以動態偵測實例的健康狀況，並自動將流量分配給健康的實例。與Route 53結合，可以實現高可用性和容錯架構。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (72%); B (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: ALB can dynamically detect the health status of instances and automatically distribute traffic to healthy instances. Combined with Route 53, high availability and fault-tolerant architecture can be achieved.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師需要設計一個由 Web、應用程式和資料庫層組成的高度可用的應用程式。 HTTPS 內容交付應盡可能靠近邊緣，且交付時間最短。哪種解決方案符合這些要求並且最安全？
question_text.en: A solutions architect needs to design a highly available application consisting of web, application, and database tiers. HTTPS content delivery should be as close to the edge as possible, with the least delivery time. Which solution meets these requirements and is MOST secure?

A.zh: 在公用子網路中配置具有多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體的公用應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以使用公共 ALB 作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。
A.en: Configure a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the public ALB as the origin.

B.zh: 在私有子網路中配置具有多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體的公用 Application Load Balancer。設定 Amazon CloudFront 以使用 EC2 執行個體作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。
B.en: Configure a public Application Load Balancer with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the EC2 instances as the origin.

C.zh: 在私有子網路中配置具有多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體的公用應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以使用公共 ALB 作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。
C.en: Configure a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the public ALB as the origin.

D.zh: 在公有子網路中配置具有多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體的公有 Application Load Balancer。設定 Amazon CloudFront 以使用 EC2 執行個體作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。
D.en: Configure a public Application Load Balancer with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in public subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the EC2 instances as the origin.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定公有 ALB 並在公有子網路中部署多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以使用公共 ALB 作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。公有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體暴露在 Internet 上並帶來安全風險。安全性：不符合最佳實踐，建議將 EC2 執行個體放置在私有子網路中以提高安全性。
A.en: Incorrect. Configure a public ALB and deploy multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in a public subnet. Configure Amazon CloudFront to use a public ALB as the origin to deliver HTTPS content. EC2 instances in public subnets are exposed to the Internet and pose a security risk. Security: Not in line with best practices, it is recommended to place EC2 instances in private subnets to improve security.

B.zh: 錯誤。配置公用 ALB 並在私有子網路中部署多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體。設定 Amazon CloudFront 以使用 EC2 執行個體作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。 CloudFront 通常使用負載平衡器（例如 ALB）作為來源，而不是直接使用 EC2 執行個體。安全性：EC2 執行個體在私有子網路中是安全的，但直接使用 EC2 執行個體作為來源並不是最佳實務。
B.en: Incorrect. Configure a public ALB and deploy multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet. Configure Amazon CloudFront to use an EC2 instance as the origin to deliver HTTPS content. CloudFront typically uses a load balancer (such as an ALB) as the source rather than using EC2 instances directly. Security: EC2 instances are secure in private subnets, but using EC2 instances directly as sources is not a best practice.

C.zh: 正確。設定公用 ALB 並在私人子網路中部署多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以使用公共 ALB 作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。 ALB 作為來源符合最佳實踐，並且將 EC2 執行個體放置在私有子網路中可以提高安全性。安全性：公用 ALB 可以處理外部流量，而私有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體不會直接暴露於 Internet。
C.en: Correct. Configure a public ALB and deploy multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet. Configure Amazon CloudFront to use a public ALB as the origin to deliver HTTPS content. ALB as a source complies with best practices, and placing EC2 instances in a private subnet improves security. Security: The public ALB can handle external traffic, while the EC2 instances in the private subnet are not directly exposed to the Internet.

D.zh: 錯誤。設定公有 ALB 並在公有子網路中部署多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體。設定 Amazon CloudFront 以使用 EC2 執行個體作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。公有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體暴露在 Internet 上並帶來安全風險。安全性：不符合最佳實踐，建議將 EC2 執行個體放置在私有子網路中。
D.en: Incorrect. Configure a public ALB and deploy multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in a public subnet. Configure Amazon CloudFront to use an EC2 instance as the origin to deliver HTTPS content. EC2 instances in public subnets are exposed to the Internet and pose a security risk. Security: Not in line with best practices, it is recommended to place EC2 instances in private subnets.

answer_text.zh: C. 在私有子網路中配置具有多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體的公用應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以使用公共 ALB 作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。
answer_text.en: C. Configure a public Application Load Balancer (ALB) with multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in private subnets. Configure Amazon CloudFront to deliver HTTPS content using the public ALB as the origin.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：設定公用 ALB 並在私人子網路中部署多個冗餘 Amazon EC2 執行個體。配置 Amazon CloudFront 以使用公共 ALB 作為來源來傳送 HTTPS 內容。 ALB 作為來源符合最佳實踐，並且將 EC2 執行個體放置在私有子網路中可以提高安全性。安全性：公用 ALB 可以處理外部流量，而私有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體不會直接暴露於 Internet。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure a public ALB and deploy multiple redundant Amazon EC2 instances in a private subnet. Configure Amazon CloudFront to use a public ALB as the origin to deliver HTTPS content. ALB as a source complies with best practices, and placing EC2 instances in a private subnet improves security. Security: The public ALB can handle external traffic, while the EC2 instances in the private subnet are not directly exposed to the Internet.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個在 AWS 上運作的熱門遊戲平臺。該應用程式對延遲很敏感，因為延遲會影響用戶體驗並給某些玩家帶來不公平的優勢。該應用程式部署在每個 AWS 區域中。它在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行，這些執行個體是在應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面配置的 Auto Scaling 群組的一部分。解決方案架構師需要實作一種機制來監控應用程式的運作狀況並將流量重新導向到健康的端點。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has a popular gaming platform running on AWS. The application is sensitive to latency because latency can impact the user experience and introduce unfair advantages to some players. The application is deployed in every AWS Region. It runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are part of Auto Scaling groups configured behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs). A solutions architect needs to implement a mechanism to monitor the health of the application and redirect traffic to healthy endpoints. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 在 AWS Global Accelerator 中設定加速器。為應用程式偵聽的連接埠新增偵聽器，並將其附加到每個區域中的區域終端節點。新增 ALB 作為端點。
A.en: Configure an accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Add a listener for the port that the application listens on, and attach it to a Regional endpoint in each Region. Add the ALB as the endpoint.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudFront 分配並將 ALB 指定為來源伺服器。配置快取行為以使用原始快取標頭。使用 AWS Lambda 函數來優化流量。
B.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution and specify the ALB as the origin server. Configure the cache behavior to use origin cache headers. Use AWS Lambda functions to optimize the traffic.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudFront 分配並指定 Amazon S3 為來源伺服器。配置快取行為以使用原始快取標頭。使用 AWS Lambda 函數來優化流量。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront distribution and specify Amazon S3 as the origin server. Configure the cache behavior to use origin cache headers. Use AWS Lambda functions to optimize the traffic.

D.zh: 設定 Amazon DynamoDB 資料庫作為應用程式的資料儲存。建立 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 叢集作為託管應用程式資料的 DynamoDB 的記憶體快取。
D.en: Configure an Amazon DynamoDB database to serve as the data store for the application. Create a DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) cluster to act as the in-memory cache for DynamoDB hosting the application data.

A.zh: 正確。AWS Global Accelerator 專門設計用於優化世界各地使用者的流量路由，提供低延遲和高可用性。它支援健康檢查，並可以將流量重定向到健康的區域端點。將 ALB 作為端點是合理的配置。
A.en: Correct. AWS Global Accelerator is specifically designed to optimize traffic routing for users around the world, providing low latency and high availability. It supports health checks and can redirect traffic to healthy regional endpoints. Having an ALB as an endpoint is a reasonable configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront 是一個內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，主要用於快取靜態內容以提高效能。雖然它可以優化流量，但它不支援健康檢查，並且無法動態地將流量重定向到健康的端點。
B.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) primarily used for caching static content to improve performance. Although it can optimize traffic, it does not support health checks and cannot dynamically redirect traffic to healthy endpoints.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項與 B 類似，但指定 Amazon S3 為來源伺服器。 S3主要用於儲存靜態內容，與問題中提到的EC2和ALB架構不符。此外，CloudFront 仍然無法滿足健康檢查和流量重定向的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is similar to B, but specifies Amazon S3 as the origin server. S3 is mainly used to store static content and does not match the EC2 and ALB architecture mentioned in the question. Additionally, CloudFront still falls short of the need for health checks and traffic redirection.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項與問題要求完全無關。 DynamoDB 是一個 NoSQL 資料庫，DAX 是其提高資料庫查詢效能的加速器。它們與交通管理和健康檢查無關。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is completely irrelevant to the question requirements. DynamoDB is a NoSQL database and DAX is its accelerator to improve database query performance. They have nothing to do with traffic management and health checks.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 AWS Global Accelerator 中設定加速器。為應用程式偵聽的連接埠新增偵聽器，並將其附加到每個區域中的區域終端節點。新增 ALB 作為端點。
answer_text.en: A. Configure an accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Add a listener for the port that the application listens on, and attach it to a Regional endpoint in each Region. Add the ALB as the endpoint.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 專門設計用於優化世界各地使用者的流量路由，提供低延遲和高可用性。它支援健康檢查，並可以將流量重定向到健康的區域端點。將 ALB 作為端點是合理的配置。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Global Accelerator is specifically designed to optimize traffic routing for users around the world, providing low latency and high availability. It supports health checks and can redirect traffic to healthy regional endpoints. Having an ALB as an endpoint is a reasonable configuration.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有 100 萬用戶使用其行動應用程式。公司必須近乎即時地分析數據使用情況。該公司還必須近乎即時地加密數據，並且必須以 Apache Parquet 格式將數據儲存在集中位置以進行進一步處理。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has one million users that use its mobile app. The company must analyze the data usage in near-real time. The company also must encrypt the data in near-real time and must store the data in a centralized location in Apache Parquet format for further processing. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon Kinesis 資料流以將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics 應用程式來分析資料。呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數將資料傳送到 Kinesis Data Analytics 應用程式。
A.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to send the data to the Kinesis Data Analytics application.

B.zh: 建立 Amazon Kinesis 資料流以將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。建立 Amazon EMR 叢集來分析資料。呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數將資料傳送到 EMR 叢集。
B.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis data stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon EMR cluster to analyze the data. Invoke an AWS Lambda function to send the data to the EMR cluster.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流以將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。建立 Amazon EMR 叢集來分析資料。
C.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon EMR cluster to analyze the data.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流以將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics 應用程式來分析資料。
D.en: Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data.

A.zh: 錯誤。Kinesis Data Streams 本身不支援將資料儲存到 Amazon S3，需要額外的處理步驟。使用 AWS Lambda 函數將資料傳送至 Kinesis Data Analytics 會增加額外的複雜性和營運開銷。題目要求「最小運行開銷」，這個方案不符合要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Kinesis Data Streams itself does not directly support storing data to Amazon S3 and requires additional processing steps. Using AWS Lambda functions to send data to Kinesis Data Analytics adds additional complexity and operational overhead. The question requires "minimum operating overhead", and this solution does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。Kinesis Data Streams 無法將資料直接儲存到 Amazon S3，需要執行額外的步驟。 Amazon EMR 是功能強大的資料處理工具，但需要手動配置和管理，營運開銷較高。使用 AWS Lambda 函數將資料傳送至 EMR 傳輸群組會增加複雜度。
B.en: Incorrect. Kinesis Data Streams cannot store data directly to Amazon S3 and requires additional steps. Amazon EMR is a powerful data processing tool, but it requires manual configuration and management, and the operational overhead is high. Using AWS Lambda functions to send data to the EMR transmission group adds complexity.

C.zh: 錯誤。Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接傳輸到 Amazon S3 並支援 Apache Parquet 格式。 Amazon EMR 需要手動管理和配置，操作開銷較高，不符合「最小操作開銷」要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Kinesis Data Firehose can transfer data directly to Amazon S3 and supports the Apache Parquet format. Amazon EMR requires manual management and configuration, the operation overhead is high, and it does not meet the "minimum operation overhead" requirement.

D.zh: 正確。Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接傳輸到 Amazon S3 並支援 Apache Parquet 格式。 Kinesis Data Analytics 是一項託管服務，支援近乎即時的資料分析，且營運開銷較低。此解決方案完全滿足問題要求且操作開銷最小。
D.en: Correct. Kinesis Data Firehose can transfer data directly to Amazon S3 and supports the Apache Parquet format. Kinesis Data Analytics is a managed service that supports near real-time data analysis with low operational overhead. This solution fully meets the question requirements and has minimal operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: D. 建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流以將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics 應用程式來分析資料。
answer_text.en: D. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream to store the data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Kinesis Data Analytics application to analyze the data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接傳輸到 Amazon S3 並支援 Apache Parquet 格式。 Kinesis Data Analytics 是一項託管服務，支援近乎即時的資料分析，且營運開銷較低。此解決方案完全滿足問題要求且操作開銷最小。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Kinesis Data Firehose can transfer data directly to Amazon S3 and supports the Apache Parquet format. Kinesis Data Analytics is a managed service that supports near real-time data analysis with low operational overhead. This solution fully meets the question requirements and has minimal operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家遊戲公司有一個顯示分數的 Web 應用程式。該應用程式在應用程式負載平衡器後面的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。該應用程式將資料儲存在 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫中。使用者開始經歷由資料庫讀取效能引起的長時間延遲和中斷。該公司希望改善用戶體驗，同時盡量減少對應用程式架構的變更。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A gaming company has a web application that displays scores. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer. The application stores data in an Amazon RDS for MySQL database. Users are starting to experience long delays and interruptions that are caused by database read performance. The company wants to improve the user experience while minimizing changes to the application’s architecture. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在資料庫前面使用 Amazon ElastiCache。
A.en: Use Amazon ElastiCache in front of the database.

B.zh: 在應用程式和資料庫之間使用 RDS 代理程式。
B.en: Use RDS Proxy between the application and the database.

C.zh: 將應用程式從 EC2 執行個體遷移到 AWS Lambda。
C.en: Migrate the application from EC2 instances to AWS Lambda.

D.zh: 將資料庫從 Amazon RDS for MySQL 移轉到 Amazon DynamoDB。
D.en: Migrate the database from Amazon RDS for MySQL to Amazon DynamoDB.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon ElastiCache 是一項記憶體快取服務，可顯著提高資料庫讀取效能並減少使用者延遲。滿足透過快取降低資料庫的讀取壓力的要求，同時對現有架構進行最小的改動。
A.en: Correct. Amazon ElastiCache is an in-memory caching service that can significantly improve database read performance and reduce user latency. Meets the requirements of the Reduce the reading pressure of the database through caching, while making minimal changes to the existing architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。RDS Proxy 主要用於最佳化資料庫連線管理，減少連線開銷，但不會直接提升資料庫的讀取效能。不符合問題要求：使用者體驗問題是由於讀取效能不足，而不是連線管理問題。
B.en: Incorrect. RDS Proxy is mainly used to optimize database connection management and reduce connection overhead, but it will not directly improve the reading performance of the database. Does not meet the question requirements: User experience issues are due to insufficient read performance, not connection management issues.

C.zh: 錯誤。遷移到 AWS Lambda 不會直接解決資料庫讀取效能問題。這不符合要求，因為該問題需要對現有架構進行最小程度的更改，而遷移到 Lambda 會涉及重大的架構更改。
C.en: Incorrect. Migrating to AWS Lambda will not directly solve database read performance issues. This does not meet the requirement because the question requires minimal changes to the existing architecture, and migrating to Lambda involves major architectural changes.

D.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB是NoSQL資料庫，與RDS的關聯式資料庫架構不同。遷移將導致架構和應用程式發生重大變化。這不符合要求，因為問題需要對現有架構進行最小程度的更改，而遷移到 DynamoDB 涉及重大架構更改。
D.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB is a NoSQL database, which is different from the relational database architecture of RDS. Migration will cause major changes to the architecture and applications. This does not meet the requirement because the question requires minimal changes to the existing architecture, and migrating to DynamoDB involves major architectural changes.

answer_text.zh: A. 在資料庫前面使用 Amazon ElastiCache。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon ElastiCache in front of the database.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (59%)； B (41%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ElastiCache 是一項記憶體快取服務，可顯著提高資料庫讀取效能並減少使用者延遲。滿足透過快取降低資料庫的讀取壓力的要求，同時對現有架構進行最小的改動。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (59%); B (41%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ElastiCache is an in-memory caching service that can significantly improve database read performance and reduce user latency. Meets the requirements of the Reduce the reading pressure of the database through caching, while making minimal changes to the existing architecture.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司注意到其基於 Amazon RDS 的 Web 應用程式的效能下降。效能下降的原因是業務分析師觸發的唯讀 SQL 查詢數量增加。解決方案架構師需要透過對現有 Web 應用程式進行最少的更改來解決問題。解決方案架構師該推薦什麼？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company has noticed performance degradation of its Amazon RDS based web application. The performance degradation is attributed to an increase in the number of read-only SQL queries triggered by business analysts. A solutions architect needs to solve the problem with minimal changes to the existing web application. What should the solutions architect recommend?

A.zh: 將資料匯出到 Amazon DynamoDB 並讓業務分析師執行查詢。
A.en: Export the data to Amazon DynamoDB and have the business analysts run their queries.

B.zh: 將資料載入到 Amazon ElastiCache 並讓業務分析師執行他們的查詢。
B.en: Load the data into Amazon ElastiCache and have the business analysts run their queries.

C.zh: 建立主資料庫的唯讀副本並讓業務分析師執行他們的查詢。
C.en: Create a read replica of the primary database and have the business analysts run their queries.

D.zh: 將資料複製到 Amazon Redshift 叢集中，並讓業務分析師執行他們的查詢。
D.en: Copy the data into an Amazon Redshift cluster and have the business analysts run their queries.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DynamoDB 是一種 NoSQL 資料庫，與 RDS 的 SQL 查詢模型不相容。將資料匯出到DynamoDB需要對現有應用程式進行重大更改，不符合「最小更改」要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon DynamoDB is a NoSQL database that is not compatible with the SQL query model of RDS. Exporting data to DynamoDB requires major changes to the existing application and does not meet the "minimum change" requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon ElastiCache 主要用於快取資料以提高應用程式效能，而不是處理複雜的 SQL 查詢。 BusiAnalysis 查詢通常是複雜的 SQL 查詢，ElastiCache 無法直接支援這些查詢。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon ElastiCache is primarily used to cache data to speed up application performance, rather than processing complex SQL queries. BusiAnalysis queries are usually complex SQL queries, and ElastiCache cannot directly support these queries.

C.zh: 正確。只讀副本是Amazon RDS的功能之一，專門用來分擔讀取操作的壓力。建立唯讀副本可以最大限度地減少對現有應用程式的變更並滿足問題要求。
C.en: Correct. Read Replica is one of the features of Amazon RDS, specifically used to share the pressure of read operations. Creating a Read Replica minimizes changes to existing applications and meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Redshift 是適合處理大規模資料分析的資料倉儲解決方案，但遷移資料需要較大的變更。將資料複製到 Redshift 需要額外的 ETL 流程，不符合「最小化變更」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse solution suitable for handling large-scale data analysis, but migrating data requires larger changes. Copying data to Redshift requires additional ETL processes and does not meet the "minimize changes" requirement.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立主資料庫的唯讀副本並讓業務分析師執行他們的查詢。
answer_text.en: C. Create a read replica of the primary database and have the business analysts run their queries.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：只讀副本是Amazon RDS的功能之一，專門用來分擔讀取操作的壓力。建立唯讀副本可以最大限度地減少對現有應用程式的變更並滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Read Replica is one of the features of Amazon RDS, specifically used to share the pressure of read operations. Creating a Read Replica minimizes changes to existing applications and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用集中式 AWS 帳戶將日誌資料儲存在各個 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。解決方案架構師需要確保在將資料上傳到 S3 儲存桶之前對資料進行靜態加密。資料在傳輸過程中也必須加密。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is using a centralized AWS account to store log data in various Amazon S3 buckets. A solutions architect needs to ensure that the data is encrypted at rest before the data is uploaded to the S3 buckets. The data also must be encrypted in transit. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 使用客戶端加密來加密上傳到 S3 儲存桶的資料。
A.en: Use client-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets.

B.zh: 使用伺服器端加密來加密上傳到 S3 儲存桶的資料。
B.en: Use server-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets.

C.zh: 建立儲存桶策略，要求使用具有 S3 託管加密金鑰 (SSE-S3) 的伺服器端加密來進行 S3 上傳。
C.en: Create bucket policies that require the use of server-side encryption with S3 managed encryption keys (SSE-S3) for S3 uploads.

D.zh: 啟用安全選項以透過使用預設 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 金鑰來加密 S3 儲存桶。
D.en: Enable the security option to encrypt the S3 buckets through the use of a default AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key.

A.zh: 正確。用戶端加密確保資料在上傳到S3之前進行加密，從而滿足「資料在儲存時加密」的要求。另外，資料在傳輸過程中可以透過HTTPS協定進行加密，滿足「資料在傳輸過程中加密」的要求。
A.en: Correct. Client-side encryption ensures that data is encrypted before uploading to S3, thereby satisfying the requirement that "data is encrypted on storage". In addition, data can be encrypted by HTTPS protocol during transmission, meeting the requirement of "data being encrypted during transmission".

B.zh: 錯誤。伺服器端加密是資料上傳到S3後由S3進行加密。無法確保資料在上傳過程中已加密。此選項並未明確提及如何在傳輸過程中處理資料加密。
B.en: Incorrect. Server-side encryption is encrypted by S3 after the data is uploaded to S3. There is no way to ensure that the data has been encrypted during the upload process. This option does not explicitly mention how to handle encryption of data during transmission.

C.zh: 錯誤。儲存桶策略可以強制使用伺服器端加密，但這仍然會對資料上傳到S3後進行加密，並且無法確保資料在上傳過程中已加密。此選項並不能解決傳輸過程中資料加密的問題。
C.en: Incorrect. The bucket policy can force the use of server-side encryption, but this still encrypts the data after it is uploaded to S3, and there is no way to ensure that the data has been encrypted during the upload process. This option does not solve the problem of data encryption during transmission.

D.zh: 錯誤。啟用AWS KMS加密是伺服器端加密的一種方式，它在資料上傳到S3後仍會對資料進行加密。此選項並不能解決傳輸過程中資料加密的問題。
D.en: Incorrect. Enabling AWS KMS encryption is a way of server-side encryption, which still encrypts the data after it is uploaded to S3. This option does not solve the problem of data encryption during transmission.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用客戶端加密來加密上傳到 S3 儲存桶的資料。
answer_text.en: A. Use client-side encryption to encrypt the data that is being uploaded to the S3 buckets.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (94%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：用戶端加密確保資料在上傳到S3之前進行加密，從而滿足「資料在儲存時加密」的要求。另外，資料在傳輸過程中可以透過HTTPS協定進行加密，滿足「資料在傳輸過程中加密」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (94%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Client-side encryption ensures that data is encrypted before uploading to S3, thereby satisfying the requirement that "data is encrypted on storage". In addition, data can be encrypted by HTTPS protocol during transmission, meeting the requirement of "data being encrypted during transmission".
